title: Problem Solving – Find the Whole Group Using Unit Fractions
essential_question: How can you find the total number in a group when you know a unit fraction of the group?
strategies: if 1/n of the group = a known number, multiply that number by n to find the whole

pretest.question: 1/3 of a group is 4. How many are in the whole group?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.9 'Problem Solving: Find the Whole Group' pp.345-348
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: From Part to Whole
learn.content: If you know a unit fraction of a group, you can find the whole group by multiplying. Example: 1/4 of a group is 6. The whole group = 6 × 4 = 24.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.9 'Problem Solving: Find the Whole Group' pp.345-348
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Why Multiply?
learn.content: A unit fraction like 1/4 means the whole is made of 4 equal parts. If 1 part = 6, then 4 parts = 6 + 6 + 6 + 6 = 24. Multiplying is a shortcut: 6 × 4 = 24.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.9 'Problem Solving: Find the Whole Group' pp.345-348
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Check Your Answer
learn.content: After finding the whole, check by dividing. If the whole is 24 and the fraction is 1/4, then 24 ÷ 4 = 6. That matches the given part, so the answer is correct.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.9 'Problem Solving: Find the Whole Group' pp.345-348
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 전체 = 부분 × b — 핵심 공식
learn.content: 1/b of N = P이면 N = P × b.   1/3 of N = 6 → N = 6 × 3 = 18   1/4 of N = 5 → N = 5 × 4 = 20 🔍 직관: 부분이 b개 모이면 전체가 됨.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.9 'Problem Solving: Find the Whole Group' pp.345-348
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 역연산 — 나눗셈의 반대
learn.content: L8에서 1/b of N = N÷b를 배웠음. 이번에는 거꾸로: 부분 P를 알고 N을 찾기 → 곱하기.   N÷b = P (앞 단계)   N = P×b (역연산) 검산: P × b의 답을 다시 b로 나누면 P가 되어야 함.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.9 'Problem Solving: Find the Whole Group' pp.345-348
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 전체 찾기 3단계 루틴
learn.content: 부분 → 전체 풀이 3단계:   단계 1) 단위분수 1/b의 분모 b 확인.   단계 2) 부분 값 P 확인.   단계 3) N = P × b 계산. 예: 1/4가 7이면 → 1) b=4, 2) P=7, 3) N=7×4=28.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.9 'Problem Solving: Find the Whole Group' pp.345-348
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 막대 모델 — b개 칸으로 시각화
learn.content: 1/b가 P이면 막대를 b개 칸으로 그리고 한 칸을 P로 표시.   예: 1/4 of N = 5 → [5][5][5][5] → N = 20 🔍 막대 모델은 곱셈을 시각적으로 보여줌. 한 칸 × 칸 수 = 전체.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.9 'Problem Solving: Find the Whole Group' pp.345-348
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 문장제 신호 — '~의 1/b가 P'
learn.content: 문장 패턴: 'A의 1/b는 P이다 → A는?'   예: '학생의 1/3이 8명이면 전체는?' → 8 × 3 = 24명.   예: '돈의 1/5가 4달러면 전체는?' → 4 × 5 = 20달러. 흔한 실수 (M04): 부분과 전체 혼동 — 'A의 1/b'에서 A가 전체임을 명심.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.9 'Problem Solving: Find the Whole Group' pp.345-348
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic F — Comparison, Order, and Size of Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

vertical_alignment.prerequisite: G3 U8 L8 — 1/b of N = N÷b (3.NF.A.1)
vertical_alignment.current: G3 — 부분으로 전체 찾기: 1/b of N = P → N = P×b (3.NF.A.1)
vertical_alignment.successor: G3 U9 L1 — 분수 비교 시작 (3.NF.A.3)
